Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dreadgod cults]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Three Monarchs from the Dreadgod cults were selected for Reigan Shen in the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Dreadgod cults are groups that compete in the Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Dreadgod cults are considered enemies to anyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Dreadgod cults are pinning Fury and others in Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sacred artists from the Dreadgod cults are present at Sky's Edge.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The Dreadgod cults are a faction in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — There are four Dreadgod cults positioned over the four peaks of Sacred Valley.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Half the crowd at the fighting tent comes from the Dreadgod cults.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
